name: Use of Implicit Intent for Sensitive Communication
description: An Android application uses implicit intents to transmit sensitive data, which can be intercepted by any application that registers a matching intent filter. This allows untrusted applications to access confidential information, modify data in transit, or hijack the communication entirely.
detection_pattern: EGRESS[implicit_intent] sends sensitive data from STORAGE[sensitive] via an implicit intent (no explicit component target) without using an AUTH[permission] restriction, allowing any EXTERNAL[app] with a matching intent-filter to intercept
